description: Tagging system guidelines for wiki pages — domain-specific patterns, prohibited generics, aliases policy, and cross-reference enforcement.

policy.rule: All pages MUST have 3-7 tags. No generic/broad terms alone.

entities/.description: Specific tools, projects, people — use their actual names + domain category

concepts/.description: Architectural patterns, principles — use precise technical terms

syntheses/.description: Topic-specific synthesis — use combined domain tags

comparisons/.description: Compare-specific tags — both entities being compared

aliases_system.description: Discoverability synonyms — what users actually type in queries
inclusion_rules: Common synonyms ('LLM Wiki Pattern' for Loomana)
Bilingual variants if used by user (EN/RU)
exclusion_rules: Architecture terms — these are tags, not aliases

cross_reference_enforcement.rule: If page A links to page B → both must share at least one common tag
cross_reference_enforcement.enforcement: process-ingest.json#post_check: validate shared tags before writing crosslinks

language_consistency.rule: Use EITHER English OR Russian within one document — never mix languages in tags
language_consistency.recommendation: English preferred for consistency with AGENTS.md conventions
exceptions: Russian-only content pages may use ru-tags exclusively

lint_validation_check.description: Validate tag quality — empty, generic, or comment-embedded tags

actions.action: error: inline comments break YAML parsing
